title: Classic All Surface Swingball Set, Real Tennis Ball, Championship Bats, All Surface Base with Integrated Carry Case for Transportation, For ages 6+ to Adult, Classic Outdoor Games, Red and Yellow
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: SWINGBALL CLASSIC: It’s the classic tennis game we all know and love with a brand-enhanced look! The Classic All Surface Swingball is a high energy game that will get everyone up off of their seats. If you weren’t competitive before, you will for sure be now.

OUTDOOR GAMES: Swingball has been a hit with families for generations, compete to get the ball to the top or bottom of the spiral to win. This game comes with a real tennis ball, 2 championship bats, and a height adjustable pole (up to 1.65m tall!)

INCLUDED: The enhanced and improved all surface base contains a handle for easy portability and a water plug to avoid any spillages when filling up your base! With a balancing feet for stable play and converts to a carry case, making transportation easy.

SUITABLE FOR ALL SURFACES: With Swingballs All Surface base, you can play anywhere on any surface. Simply fill the base with sand or water and then you are ready to go play with friends and family anywhere you want, outdoors or even indoors.

FOR CHILDREN AND ADULTS: Suitable for everyone, ages 6 to adult, it is the ideal garden toy game to get everyone involved in the garden, in the home or at the beach. But be warned, Swingball cannot be held responsible for competitive streaks.
